title: Death on Louis Fourie under investigation
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Police...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Police have opened a case of culpable homicide after a man died on Louis Fourie Road near the turn-off to the Garden Route Casino at about 04:30 on Monday 17 November.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The Mossel Bay Police have opened a case of culpable homicide after a man died on Louis Fourie Road near the turn-off to the Garden Route Casino at about 04:30 on Monday 17 November."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The Southern Cape Police’s spokesperson, Sergeant Chris Spies, said the police were called out and found a man on the road with multiple injuries. Emergency medical services declared him dead."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A vehicle was also found on the scene, and the circumstances surrounding the death are under investigation.","html":"A vehicle was also found on the scene, and the circumstances surrounding the death are under investigation."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you have any information on the incident, contact the investigating officer, Warrant Officer Francois Pick, on 079 893 9937.","html":"If you have any information on the incident, contact the investigating officer, Warrant Officer Francois Pick, on 079 893 9937."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Death on Louis Fourie under investigation
